description: VoiceIsolate Pro ONNX model registry — all models execute locally via onnxruntime-web (WebGPU → WASM fallback). NO cloud inference. Models are fetched once on first run from HuggingFace CDN and stored in the browser Cache API by model-loader.js.

models.purpose: Voice Activity Detection — gates the pipeline before heavy ML stages
RNNoise — lightweight broadband noise suppressor, always-on stage 1
Hybrid Demucs v4 — primary vocals / accompaniment source separation
Band-Split RNN — secondary vocals extractor used in Creator/Forensic mode

delivery_notes: silero_vad.onnx is committed to the repo and served directly by Vercel from public/app/models/.
rnnoise_suppressor.onnx, demucs_v4_quantized.onnx, and bsrnn_vocals.onnx are fetched on first run from HuggingFace CDN (Joker5514/models dataset) and cached in the browser Cache API.
After first run all models are served from Cache API (vip-models-v1) — zero network on repeat visits.
The service worker (sw.js) intercepts /app/models/*.onnx fetches and returns the cached binary to ml-worker.js.
100% local processing guarantee preserved — no audio data leaves the browser.

model_loader_behavior.download_ui: Show progress modal with per-model MB progress bar. Demucs download (83MB) must show estimated time. Do not block UI thread during fetch.
model_loader_behavior.integrity_check: sha256 field — leave empty to skip check, populate after upload to enable.
